fault_hypothesis: The function fails to conserve fuel because it truncates floating-point shares to integers on line 66. This systematically discards fractional amounts, causing the sum of allocations to be less than the total available fuel.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations must be nearly equal to the total fuel.
The sum of continuous planned shares from the helper function must be almost exactly the total.
The sum of the returned allocations must conserve the total fuel.
The sum of rounded float allocations should still conserve the total fuel, unlike the integer truncation branch.
